title: EU orders Google to open Android to rival AI assistants and share Search data with competitors
reason: Cycle 2: fresh ingest re-surfaced this story (EU/Google DMA coverage in gnews-ai-litigation.json and gnews-ai-regulation-and-policy.json), so the watching entry from cycle 1 was re-checked per the work order. Closed all three outstanding evidence gaps: (1) legal status corroborated as a final decision via Google's own reactive statement plus two independently-written outlet accounts (EC presscorner body text remained unretrievable -- JS shell only, 3 attempts), (2) Kent Walker's quote sourced directly to blog.google, (3) identified 9to5Google and Android Authority as independently-written coverage distinct from the AFP-style wire cluster. Full multi-agent protocol run: fresh verifier sub-agent, then adversarial falsifier sub-agent (verdict: CLEAR TO PUBLISH). Editor gate passed EN and TR. Published this cycle.
